case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR VS. LOYD CASTEEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DORAN GIN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER AT THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFFICE OF THE TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LOYD CASTEEL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CASTEEL, LOYD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
